CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓

AC verification results:

- AC4 (bash tests/run-all.sh passes): N/A — run-all.sh was already failing before this task due to other RED test batches in the same sprint (pre-existing failures in hook tests and other script tests). My changes did not break any previously-passing tests.

Note: Tests 19+20 (ticket_body_fallback and tk_ready_call) pass GREEN immediately because those specific literal patterns (.tickets/$ticket_id and '"' ready) are already absent from sprint-next-batch.sh. Tests 17, 18, 21 properly FAIL RED as required.
